title: taraxacum pseudoproximum
intro: Taraxacum pseudoproximum, also known as the lesser dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties due to its high concentration of bioactive compounds, including flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids. The health benefits of Taraxacum pseudoproximum include its potential to support liver function, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The herbal preparations of Taraxacum pseudoproximum include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
